overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city street at night. The character moves along a reflective pedestrian walkway lined with digital billboards and purple neon-lit buildings, eventually stopping to observe a large advertisement screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian walkway under building overhang

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the reflective pedestrian pathway through the cyberpunk city district

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blonde hair and dark jacket walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: building facade with glowing purple neon strip lights and metal mesh panels
tall vertical digital advertisement screen displaying animated content with female model
towering futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage
wet-look reflective paved pedestrian walkway with orange-brown tones

segments.scene_description: The segment shows continuous forward movement along a covered pedestrian walkway in a futuristic city. The path is lined with a purple neon-lit building on the right and digital billboards on the left. Various NPCs walk in scattered directions, and the reflective pavement mirrors the vibrant neon lights from the surrounding architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: advertisement viewing area with large curved digital display

events.description: character slows down and stops to observe the large curved advertisement screen

agents.ego_description: stopping near the large curved advertisement screen and looking up at the luxury product display

notable_agents.action: female NPC in red skirt and black top standing near the advertisement, looking at the screen

entered.detail: massive curved digital billboard displaying luxury beverage advertisement with bright white and gold colors

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and stops before a massive curved digital advertisement screen on the right side of the walkway. A female NPC stands nearby also observing the display. The vertical billboard and distant skyline are no longer visible as the camera focuses on the large advertisement and the immediate surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a vibrant futuristic thoroughfare that transitions from a wide urban stroll to a focused observation of a digital display. It begins by gliding along a covered pedestrian walkway, where the reflective pavement mirrors the glow of purple neon buildings and digital billboards while NPCs move in scattered directions. As the camera advances, the expansive view of the distant skyline and vertical billboards gradually recedes. The scene then shifts its focus as the character approaches and comes to a halt before a massive curved advertisement screen on the right. Finally, the perspective narrows to the immediate surroundings, centering on the large display and a nearby female NPC also observing the screen.
